title: Sadamotos Akira and Annos Space Batteship Yamato
display_title: Sadamotos Akira and Annos Space Batteship Yamato
wikitext:
[]: Sadamoto's Akira and Anno's Space Batteship Yamato             Quote Post by MarioAyanami128 » Mon Nov 18, 2013 8:14 am So, I've been surfing the net, when I stumbled upon this: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2013-11-14/yoshiyuki-sadamoto-draws-akira-for-anime-busience-magazine I loved Sadamoto's interpretation of Akira and Anno's design of Space Battleship Yamato is awesome, specially for the magazine's first cover. Gotta admit, though, I liked the Zelda reference made in the Akira illustration!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Nov 18, 2013 9:31 am Here's a better resolution image.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 18, 2013 9:48 am Kaneda looks like a very pissed-off Shinji, which ties perfectly with the manga's depiction of Shinji!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 18, 2013 11:34 am Pretty cool. Thanks for the info!

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Nov 18, 2013 12:05 pm Kaneda really does look like Manga-Shinji. Now I have visions of Manga-Shinji shouting at Kaworu with the accents from the 80s English Dub! And there seems to be a touch of Eva in the Yamato design - perhaps it's the way Anno draws the bulbous lines on the bow of the ship and the use of the same shading that he normally uses for Eva sketches.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 18, 2013 1:18 pm UrsusArctos wrote: And there seems to be a touch of Eva in the Yamato design - perhaps it's the way Anno draws the bulbous lines on the bow of the ship and the use of the same shading that he normally uses for Eva sketches.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Mon Nov 18, 2013 1:34 pm Holy crap it is cool as shit!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Nov 18, 2013 1:48 pm If we were to really see the Eva x Akira crossover the sponsor stickers would be on the bike.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Mon Nov 18, 2013 6:32 pm Evangelion 3.33, to me, always struck me as a homage to Space Battleship Yamato, just like Misato here was homage Juzio Okita more than Captain Nemo from Nadia. LOLz at the illustration, baka Shinji, is that you?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Nov 18, 2013 9:02 pm Nemo from Nadia took clues from Bruno Gloval from Macross, and he was a partial subversion of the deadly-serious Okita. Older Misato looks more like Okita than the others - particularly the look in her eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by Lord ikari shinji » Mon Dec 02, 2013 9:00 pm WOUNDERFUL art work. sadamoto is an awesome artist
